creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
The only way out I saw is the attached patch.

--- includes_subdir_lib/ncurses ---
make[5]: "/usr/src/share/mk/bsd.libnames.mk" line 190: /usr/src/lib/ncurses/form: Missing value for LIBFORMW in bsd.libnames.mk.  Likely should be: LIBFORMW?= ${LIBDESTDIR}${LIBDIR_BASE}/libformw.a
